title: Hurt
album: American IV: The Man Comes Around
why_this_song: Hurt by Johnny Cash (2002) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I hurt myself today"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I hurt myself today"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "What have I become"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "My sweetest friend"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "My sweetest friend"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hurt" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hurt" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And you could have it all

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: To see if I still feel

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hurt" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hurt" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hurt" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hurt"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Johnny Cash one question about "Hurt", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Johnny Cash sobre "Hurt", o que seria e por quê?
